emails.subject: RE: C/P Change.
emails.body: Hi Stephanie, I just wanted to be sure you received the documents I sent you on Sequent. I was also wondering where we stand. If you could let me know I would appreciate it. Thanks, Leigh To: Hayman, Kendra

emails.subject: RE: C/P Change.
emails.body: The documentation they sent does not show that Sequent Energy Management, LLC became Sequent Energy Management, L.P. The documents they sent show that 1) Sequent Energy Management, LLC changed its name to Sequent, LLC, 2) Sequent Energy, LP changed its name to Sequent Energy Management, LP, and 3) Sequent, LLC is the general partner of Sequent Energy Management, L.P. I have left a message for the individual who sent the documents to us. Stephanie Panus Senior Legal Specialist Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3803C Houston, Texas 77002 ph: 713.345.3249 fax: 713.646.3490 email: stephanie.panus@enron.com To: Panus, Stephanie

emails.subject: RE: C/P Change.
emails.body: Thank you for the update. Just let me know when you here something. Leigh To: Hayman, Kendra
